name: All Purpose Dry Rub
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the spices in a small bowl.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Store the blend in an airtight container for up to 8 weeks.
4. Keep in a cool, dark place.
This rub pairs well with ribs, Boston butt, beef brisket, whole chicken, and boneless, skinless chicken breasts.
